title: DigitalClone AI Output
description: The single normalized payload the AI Hub MUST emit before any OUTPUT/action spoke runs. Action spokes (post to Slack, write to DB, call an API) translate this neutral shape INTO provider-specific calls. This decouples the model's decision from the delivery mechanism.

correlation_id.description: MUST equal the inbound event's correlation_id.

path.description: Routing decision. alpha=informational reply, beta=create task/log, gamma=fetch+summarize, deny=guardrail refusal.

summary.description: Short human-readable description of what the Hub decided/did. Stored in activity_logs.ai_summary.

reply.description: Optional message to send back to the originating channel.

actions.description: Zero or more neutral actions for output spokes to execute, in order.

tool.description: Neutral tool name resolved by the action router.

params.description: Tool-specific arguments. Validated by the spoke that owns the tool.

guardrail.description: Populated when path='deny' or a safety rule fired.

confidence.description: Model's self-reported confidence in the routing decision.

metadata.description: Model name, token usage, latency, etc. for observability.
